Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Damian Casey, Esq. 213-580-7976 Lewis Brisbois for Defendant Lyft; specially appearing for co-defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Casey discusses the stipulation which was rejected by the clerk since all parties to the case have not signed the stipulation. Coounsel informs the Court Plaintiff will dismiss these parties. Mr. Casey requests to enter the stipulation and proposed order signed by all parties who appeared on the case. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

The Court takes the motion Off calendar. Counsel may re-file this motion and attach the stipulation to the motion, once Plaintiff has dismissed the three parties.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Feb-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Motion withdrawn on February 8, 2023. = (302/CK)

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings

No appearance.

The tentative ruling was adopted.

Lyft, Inc.'s unopposed "motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings" is granted.

Counsel for the moving party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)
